subject: Re: =?utf-8?B?QUnliqnnkIblho3ljYfnuqfvvIxPcGVuQ2w=?=
body:
Subject: Re: HDMI 2.1 Cable Inquiry - 1000 pcs

Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for your interest in our HDMI 2.1 cables.

To provide you with accurate specifications and pricing for 1000 pieces, I need a few details:

• Required cable length(s)
• Connector type preference (standard, mini, micro)
• Bandwidth requirements (up to 48Gbps available)
• Target delivery timeline
• Destination country for shipping

Our HDMI 2.1 cables support 4K@120Hz, 8K@60Hz, and feature enhanced audio return channel (eARC). We maintain strict quality standards with comprehensive testing protocols.

For quantities of 1000+ pieces, we offer competitive wholesale pricing and can arrange pre-production samples for your evaluation.

Could you please reply with the specifications above so I can prepare a detailed quotation?

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Farreach Electronic
Sales Representative
